response.justification: The candidate has extensive general software development experience and good communication skills, with some exposure to the FinTech domain. However, they demonstrate very limited professional C++ development experience (only 7 months explicitly mentioned), which is a critical mandatory requirement of 5-10 years for this role. Furthermore, specific SQL Server or Oracle database experience and Windows platform expertise are not evident in the resume, leading to a poor overall fit for this C++ Developer position.
strengths: Extensive general software development experience (10+ years).
Demonstrated experience with CI/CD practices and developer tooling.
Apparent strong communication skills through workshops and talks.
concerns: Minimal professional C++ development experience, falling significantly short of the 5-10 years required.
Lack of explicit experience with SQL Server or Oracle databases, only general SQL/MySQL is mentioned.
No clear indication of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform.
